---
# title: "Laszlo Szabo"
# listing:
#   contents: posts
#   sort: "date desc"
#   type: default
#   categories: true
#   sort-ui: false
#   filter-ui: false
# page-layout: full
# title-block-banner: true

# date: last-modified
format: 
  html: default
  # pdf: default
title: "Laszlo Szabo"
image: images/profile_pic.jpeg

about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/drszabolaszlo
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/drszabolaszlo/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Laszlo75
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact Me
      href: mailto:Laszlo.Szabo@wales.nhs.uk
      
# bibliography: publications-2023-04.bib
  
# nocite: |
#   @*

toc: true
toc-depth: 2.0
---
